assumptions: The question concerns the initial recognition of the shareholder loan as a financial instrument under IFRS 9.
The issue is limited to identifying initial recognition and measurement approaches grounded in the provided IFRS 9 context.

approaches.label: Transaction price
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 B5.1.1 states that the fair value of a financial instrument at initial recognition is normally the transaction price.

approaches.label: Initial fair value
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 B5.1.1 and B5.1.2 identify separate initial measurement at fair value when the consideration includes something other than the financial instrument or the loan bears off-market terms, with present value of future cash flows given as the relevant fair value technique.

approaches.label: Day-one difference
approaches.rationale_for_inclusion: IFRS 9 B5.1.2A sets out a distinct recognition treatment when fair value at initial recognition differs from transaction price, with either immediate recognition or deferral depending on observability.
